positive: A symmetrical, intricate cosmic mandala design featuring stylized celestial elements: crescent moons, flowing nebulae patterns, geometric constellations, and stylized floral filigree. The composition should be highly detailed, centered, and suitable for a circular/square crop, utilizing deep indigo and ethereal gold/teal contrast against a negative space background. Style must be sharp, vector-graphic, linocut print aesthetic, highly contrasted silhouette art. Perfect for apparel placement, elegant, mystical, and balanced.
